all.critique:
Below are my remarks on the analysis, organized by affected function or area and the severity of each issue:

1. Abstract Method Enforcement in update_schedule  
 • The analysis correctly identifies that update_schedule should be decorated with @abstractmethod. One minor note is that while the analysis states “raise NotImplementedError” inside update_schedule, in practice the @abstractmethod decorator already prevents instantiation without a proper override.
